title: Grilled Aubergine with Algerian Spice
description: A flavorful and spicy dish made with grilled aubergine, roasted red peppers, and a blend of Algerian spices.
instructions: Brush the aubergine and red pepper with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Grill the aubergine and red pepper for 5-7 minutes on each side, or until charred.
Transfer the grilled vegetables to a plate and let cool slightly.
Mix the Algerian spice mix with garlic and rub it all over the grilled vegetables.
Serve the grilled aubergine and red pepper hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
Note: For a smokier flavor, you can grill the vegetables over indirect heat for 10-15 minutes.
